About

Description

GOVT HSS EXCELLENCE, SUBHASH, SHIVAJI NAGAR was established in 1964 and it is managed by the Department of Education. It is located in Urban area. It is located in PHANDA URBAN NEW block of BHOPAL district of Madhya Pradesh. The school consists of Grades from 9 to 12. The school is Co-educational and it doesn't have an attached pre-primary section. The school is Ashram (Govt.) in nature and is not using school building as a shift-school. Hindi is the medium of instructions in this school. This school is approachable by all weather road. In this school academic session starts in April
